text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for Rice Shower for some time
now. As the sun begins to set...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I was looking for something at the park.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I didn't lose anything, but another girl at
the park did.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She lost her hat and asked me to help her look for
it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I told her it was bad luck for me to help, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She kept crying, and there was no one else
around.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... We found it pretty quickly, but then it got
blown away by the wind, and it took some time to
get it back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... she was so happy once I gave her the hat
back... It made me really happy too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Still, I know that's no excuse for missing training...
I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her she did the right thing, but also that she
should contact me next time something like that
happens.
